layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical apps. Breathe.

grids.therapist_list: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 md:gap-8

layout_and_spacing.cards: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-stone-100 overflow-hidden

components_strategy.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-stone-200). Avatar for Google Auth. Visible links on desktop.
components_strategy.hero: Large soft-focus image overlayed with bg-stone-900/40. Left-aligned typography. Float a subtle search/filter bar over the bottom edge of the hero.
components_strategy.buttons: Rounded-full or soft rounded-xl. Primary CTA is emerald-800 text-white. Include explicit hover states (translate-y-[-2px] shadow-md).
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn UI customized. border-stone-200, focus:ring-emerald-500, rounded-xl.
components_strategy.badges: For bairro (neighborhood) and rating. rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium bg-stone-100 text-stone-700.
components_strategy.calendar: Shadcn Calendar for booking dates. Accent color emerald-800.
components_strategy.video_player: Rounded-2xl overflow-hidden relative group, center play button with blur backdrop.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 on cards. Buttons must change background color and elevate.
motion_and_interaction.page_load: Framer motion stagger children for the list of massagistas.

hero_backgrounds.description: Rio de Janeiro sunset landscape, use for hero section background.

services_and_spa.description: Massage detail shot, use for service details or gallery.
Spa environment, use for booking flow or location details.

key_functionalities: Location-based search mapping user to nearest Bairros (Ipanema, Leblon, Copacabana, Botafogo).
List of massagistas sorted by distance/rating.
Massagista Profile Page: Bio, gallery (photos/video thumbnail), hourly rates (60/90/120 min).
Checkout Flow: Select duration -> Date/Time via Calendar -> Location (Studio or Home) -> Stripe Payment.
User Dashboard: 'Minhas Reservas' (My Bookings) showing past and upcoming appointments.
Google Auth Login integrated into the header.
Mobile-first responsive layout (drawer filters for mobile, sidebar for desktop).

data_testid_conventions.rules: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid. Use kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use .js/.jsx files for React components. Do NOT use .tsx files as per environment constraints.
Initialize Tailwind config with Outfit and Manrope fonts. Add them via Google Fonts.
Build a mobile-first UI using Shadcn components (Drawer, Dialog, Calendar, Form, Button, Input).
Implement the Glassmorphism sticky header strictly with backdrop-blur-xl and backdrop-saturate-150.
For the massagista profile, use an asymmetrical bento grid for desktop (Hero image col-span-8, Booking widget col-span-4).
Never use red (iFood color). Stick strictly to the Organic & Earthy palette (Stone and Emerald).
For the demo video on the profile, simulate a video player using a thumbnail image and a centered play button overlay.
Implement a realistic mock of Stripe checkout (a summary card + mock pay button).
Ensure all text is in Portuguese as requested.
